subject: ARALING_PANLIPUNAN
title: Hymns and Arts of Place
objective: Tuklasin ang orihinal na spoken chant at sining nang walang kinopyang liriko o sagradong disenyo.
introduction: Gumamit lamang ng bagong sulat na teksto at original visual motifs para sa prototype. You will explore examples, sort cards, practice, and answer five questions.

vocabulary.definition: A key word used in the lesson “Hymns and Arts of Place”.
A key word used in the lesson “Hymns and Arts of Place”.
A key word used in the lesson “Hymns and Arts of Place”.

activities.instruction: Pag-aralan ang ideya at pakinggan ang salaysay.
activities.content: Gumamit lamang ng bagong sulat na teksto at original visual motifs para sa prototype.
activities.accessibilityAlternative: Text alternative: Gumamit lamang ng bagong sulat na teksto at original visual motifs para sa prototype.

activities.instruction: Suriin ang bawat learning token at basahin ang mga halimbawa.
activities.accessibilityAlternative: A numbered list of the same examples is available for keyboard and screen-reader use.

activities.instruction: Ilagay ang bawat card sa “angkop” o “hindi angkop.”

feedback.correct: Your groups follow the lesson rule.
feedback.retry: Use the explanation, not color or position.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: Tap an item and then tap a labeled category; dragging is optional.

feedback.retry: Read the lesson rule again. kinopyang copyrighted song and ginayang sagradong pattern do not fit.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: All choices are visible text and selectable with TalkBack.

activities.instruction: Itambal ang bawat halimbawa sa ideya ng aralin.

feedback.retry: Return to the explanation and compare one pair at a time.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: A list-based matching control replaces drag gestures.

activities.instruction: Tapusin nang sunod-sunod ang gabay na balik-aral.

feedback.correct: You are ready for the five-question check.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: Up and down buttons provide an alternative to dragging.

items.prompt: Aling pahayag ang pinakaangkop sa “Hymns and Arts of Place”?

options.text: Gumamit lamang ng bagong sulat na teksto at original visual motifs para sa prototype.

items.explanation: The correct response is “Gumamit lamang ng bagong sulat na teksto at original visual motifs para sa prototype.” because it follows the lesson explanation: Gumamit lamang ng bagong sulat na teksto at original visual motifs para sa prototype.
The correct response is “original spoken chant” because it follows the lesson explanation: Gumamit lamang ng bagong sulat na teksto at original visual motifs para sa prototype.

items.prompt: Alin ang hindi sumusunod sa ideya ng aralin?
items.explanation: The correct response is “Kopyang awit” because it follows the lesson explanation: Gumamit lamang ng bagong sulat na teksto at original visual motifs para sa prototype.
The correct response is “bagong likhang spoken chant” because it follows the lesson explanation: Gumamit lamang ng bagong sulat na teksto at original visual motifs para sa prototype.

items.prompt: Aling halimbawa ang dapat gamitin sa huling balik-aral?
items.explanation: The correct response is “attribution sa pinagmulan” because it follows the lesson explanation: Gumamit lamang ng bagong sulat na teksto at original visual motifs para sa prototype.

assetSpecs.prompt: Friendly Grade 3 cartoon storybook concept board for Hymns and Arts of Place; rounded shapes, warm dark-brown outlines, tropical palette, no embedded text, uncluttered small-screen layout. Compose overlays provide labels and interactive targets.
assetSpecs.contentDescription: Five connected learning tokens for exploring examples in Hymns and Arts of Place.
